briefs.title: Proposed: Burnaby Zoning Bylaw Rewrite to Reshape Rules for Employment, Industrial & Agricultural Land
briefs.summary: Burnaby's Committee of the Whole reviewed proposed changes to non-residential zoning districts — including Employment, Industrial, Agriculture, Institutional, and Parks — as part of a major Zoning Bylaw Rewrite. If adopted, the new rules would cut the number of zoning districts from 53 to 15, add new restrictions on self-storage facilities near transit, and introduce new conditions for businesses operating on employment and industrial lands.
briefs.action_required: Monitor the Burnaby Zoning Bylaw Rewrite website and sign up for eNewsletter updates to stay informed before adoption.
